description: M4-02 per-wheel hub independence. Car offset to X=2.0 so only the LEFT wheels touch the ramp (ramp spans X=±2; right wheel sphere radius 0.368 + half-track 0.73 needs car_X > 1.638 for full clearance). Coasts at ~5 m/s starting 10 m before the toe; left side climbs while right stays on flat ground, producing sustained L/R Fz asymmetry. Auto-records 5 s.
